  • Method Details

    • onCreate

      protected void onCreate(android.os.Bundle savedInstanceState)
      Runs on activity start.
      Overrides:
      onCreate in class androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
      Parameters:
      savedInstanceState - If the activity is being re-initialized after previously being shut down then this Bundle contains the data it most recently supplied in ComponentActivity.onSaveInstanceState(android.os.Bundle). Note: Otherwise it is null.

    • handleSearch

      private void handleSearch()
      Handler for searching for a card.

    • handlePercolate

      private void handlePercolate(org.json.JSONArray response) throws org.json.JSONException
      Handles percolating all the cards into the card container.
      Parameters:
      response - The return value from the backend's search
      Throws:
      org.json.JSONException

    • fetchCardByName

      private void fetchCardByName(String name)
      Handler for GET /api/cards/search/{name}
      Parameters:
      name - name of the card.

    • fetchCardById

      private void fetchCardById(String id)
      Handler for GET /api/cards/{id}
      Parameters:
      id - id of the card

    • makeJsonObjPutReq

      private void makeJsonObjPutReq(String cardId, String imgUrl, androidx.cardview.widget.CardView card)
      handler for PUT /api/cards/{id}
      Parameters:
      cardId - card's ID
      imgUrl - the image URL for the card
      card - the cardview component that is parent of the card.

    • addCardToBinder

      private void addCardToBinder(String cardId)
      Adds a card to the user's binder
      Parameters:
      cardId - The Card's ID

    • fetchAndRenderChart

      private void fetchAndRenderChart(String cardId, com.github.mikephil.charting.charts.CandleStickChart chart)
      Fetches data related to the candlestick chart from backend, specifically prices, and then renders the chart by calling renderCandleChart.
      Parameters:
      cardId - the card's ID
      chart - the chart component.

    • renderCandleChart

      private void renderCandleChart(com.github.mikephil.charting.charts.CandleStickChart chart, List<com.github.mikephil.charting.data.CandleEntry> entries)
      Renders the candlestick chart.
      Parameters:
      chart - The chart component
      entries - the entries in a list form.

    • toggleEditMode

      private void toggleEditMode(boolean editing)
      Editing mode toggle.
      Parameters:
      editing - Bool to determine if you are editing it or not.
